title: 1 step DFU - Language update when both EB and CC are on the latest version
scenario: Language update via Device Settings > Language applies correctly to charge case menus when earbuds and case are on latest firmware
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with the device connected and already on the latest firmware version.
2. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Language.
3. Select a new language from the available language list.
4. Tap "Update Now" to initiate the language update.
5. Wait for the language change to complete on the earbuds (EB).
6. Verify that the charge case (CC) menus and voice prompts reflect the newly selected language.
expected: The charge case menus and voice prompts display in the newly selected language after the update completes.
